_publications._publicationTitle: An inflammatory gene signature distinguishes neurofibroma Schwann cells and macrophages from cells in the normal peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: We collected neurofibromas, which grow to encompass these nerve structures, from 7-month-old Nf1 fl/fl ;DhhCre mice for comparison.
details: Neurofibromas develop by 7 months of age in this mouse model, with tumors growing to encompass nerve structures including dorsal root ganglia, nerve roots, and associated brachial plexus and sciatic nerve
